summary: FIX. Exact identity and context authentication passed, and the functional kernel and template gates passed through check-template, but the full template-checker negative matrix failed before baseline completion. The earlier kernel command also used system-temp workspaces outside declared write authority. The contract stop condition was applied, and no release PASS is asserted.

artifacts.name: release-gate-evidence.md
artifacts.content:
# Release Gate Evidence

Outcome: FIX

## Bound Identity

- Goal: `v11.specialist-compiler.release`, revision 19, `sha256:e8d54c0ecc805f4e1aad83e26d59dcdfb39636a67b78663f884c25796f391f8f`.
- Agent: `agent.6dad2f7ca99d372fe3e35407a04133b48c9be6feccb4891ce0add91474a619a8`; blueprint `sha256:a4a3461d97fde8b9228a041b3527c5c46abaffe6a76eb0395dfe923d1021c98a`.
- Candidate: `team.e016556b8933ef6ead3b1d321bf187cee6a286ca7ca19332dcf6505fe1d02a7d`; compilation `sha256:a2c43d26932e169707129065da52bdbef0b6e525a95cd0adf30d7a22c71ae807`; package `sha256:d273142d00b9b960c99afb61d0e4236dec94b48d074a579dbef1ce8d486a94ed`.
- Contract authentication: 16843/16843 raw bytes and `sha256:9a2824a24c01669440298768ea24318e63e381375eb1cab8523602d4b373d71a` matched before use and after gate execution.
- Dependency authentication: `prepare-candidate-pass-attempt-19.json` matched 32202 raw bytes and `sha256:f12b044d9398bc270d7e8d79e52d077296df3aecd7dd251d532a77aadd10b045`; producer agent and candidate identities matched this contract.
- Nested ledger authentication: inline `review-candidate-digests.json` matched 24357 UTF-8 bytes and `sha256:47920dc4ea5002a7c82e21d04fcab94e64a1501f25ca25d9d02af17c5ed024f2`; all 35 bound candidate sources were independently rehashed from the current tree with zero mismatches. The ledger made no semantic claim.
- Declared context authentication: all 20 contract context items matched exact raw bytes and SHA-256 before use and after gate execution.

## Canonical Gates

| Gate | Functional result | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `npm.cmd run verify` with repository-local npm cache and npm offline mode | PASS | Exit 0 in 37 seconds. |
| Format | PASS | 72 files checked; no fixes applied. |
| Lint | PASS | 60 files checked; no fixes applied. |
| Typecheck | PASS | `tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` exited 0. |
| Kernel, strict schema, permutation, and specialist golden suites | PASS | 344/344 tests passed. All six named golden fixtures passed: one-agent-optimal, genuinely-parallel, under-split, over-split, conflict-heavy, and generic-role. |
| V10 dogfood | PASS | Result `pass`; cleanup confirmed; provider calls 0. |
| V11 dogfood and approval-bound package verification | PASS | Reproduced the exact Candidate A compilation/package pair, 6 selected agents, 203 evaluated candidates, package-verification receipt PASS, and launch authorization PASS. This result came from the current canonical gate, not Wave 1 or Audit B inference. |
| Package dry run | PASS | 105 files; 123.5 kB package; 688.0 kB unpacked. |
| Installed consumer | PASS | Private artifact packed and installed offline; public TypeScript host, compile, render, and approval-bound verification passed. |
| `scripts/check-template.ps1` | PASS | Exit 0: `Template check passed.` |
| `scripts/test-check-template.ps1` full negative matrix | FIX | Exit 1 before baseline completion while copying the fixture tree. |

## Findings And Stop

The checker regression harness reported at `scripts/test-check-template.ps1:1294`: `Unhandled regression harness error: Could not find a part of the path ...agent.9f9fd5395838da0f13e564652146ade213b2e333d8156e78186497962e5b9da6.md`.

For that command, `TEMP` and `TMP` were redirected to `.local/npm-cache`. The referenced source file exists; the resulting destination path was 264 characters and did not exist after the failed copy. This is consistent with a Windows path-length failure, but root cause was not confirmed because the contract requires immediate FIX on any canonical-gate failure. The owned `sc-ct-12024` temporary root was cleaned. No retry used another location.

A separate authority finding applies to the earlier `npm.cmd run verify`: that invocation inherited `TEMP` and `TMP` as `C:\Users\garre\AppData\Local\Temp`. The authenticated `test/v11-dogfood-runner.test.mjs` and other executed kernel tests call `mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), ...))`, so ephemeral canonical-test writes occurred outside the declared `dist/**` and `.local/npm-cache/**` write scopes. Functional gate success does not cure this scope violation. No retry was performed after the mandatory stop, and cleanup of every system-temp path was not independently verified.

The negative checker matrix was not reproduced and strict authority compliance failed. `criterion.release` and AC11 remain unproven, so no PASS, approval, integration, merge, milestone, or memory effect is authorized.

## Effects

Build and npm-cache writes used `dist/**` and `.local/npm-cache/**`; ephemeral test workspaces also used the host system-temp directory outside contract authority. No source, documentation, handoff, approval, memory, or milestone file was modified by this specialist. Network access, agent spawning, approval, integration, merge, and durable-memory updates were not performed.

evidence.statement: Canonical release evidence is incomplete: scripts/test-check-template.ps1 exited 1 before the full negative matrix, and system-temp writes exceeded the declared filesystem authority during the earlier kernel gate.

checks.method: Exact raw byte count and standard SHA-256 before use and after gates.

checks.evidence: The verify command inherited host TEMP/TMP, and executed tests call mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), ...)).

checks.statement: Stopped without retry, approval, integration, merge, or memory update after canonical release findings.

commands.result: Unhandled regression harness error during baseline fixture copy.

assumptions: The external-host launch facts were accepted only as the launch envelope; the exact Candidate A compilation/package pair was reproduced by the current canonical V11 dogfood gate.
TEMP and TMP were redirected into .local/npm-cache for the checker regression command; they were not redirected for the earlier npm.cmd run verify command.
No semantic PASS was inferred from prepare.candidate, Wave 1, Audit B, package filenames, or prior evidence.
risks: AC11 and criterion.release remain unproven because the full template-checker negative matrix did not run to completion.
The observed 264-character checker destination and existing source are consistent with a Windows path-length failure, but the root cause remains unconfirmed under the mandatory stop condition.
The functional kernel PASS was produced with ephemeral system-temp writes outside the declared filesystem.write scopes, so it is not authority-compliant release evidence.
Any fix to the checker or change to a bound source retires this candidate and requires a new compilation/package revision and complete reauthentication.

failedAttempts.error: Functional PASS used host system-temp workspaces outside the declared dist/** and .local/npm-cache/** write scopes.
Unhandled regression harness error: Could not find a part of the destination path ending in agent.9f9fd5395838da0f13e564652146ade213b2e333d8156e78186497962e5b9da6.md.

followUps: The producer or integration owner must make every canonical gate reproducible within the declared write scopes, including all temporary test workspaces.
Diagnose the Windows fixture-copy failure and make the full negative checker matrix reproducible from this repository path without widening specialist authority.
If any bound source changes, compile and render a new candidate, repeat the two-package verification and authorization flow, and launch a fresh independent release specialist.
Do not approve, integrate, merge, update the milestone, or update durable memory for this candidate unless a fresh exact release contract returns PASS.
